'''âng-z-dh''' ('''kangazadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zhoozh|zhoozh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zhoozh|zhoozh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-z-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangazadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingazadh|thingazadh]] || [[word:jingazadh|jingazadh]] || [[word:shingazadh|shingazadh]] || [[word:kingazadh|kingazadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungazadh|thuthungazadh]] || [[word:jujungazadh|jujungazadh]] || [[word:shushungazadh|shushungazadh]] || [[word:kukungazadh|kukungazadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungazadh|thungazadh]] || [[word:jungazadh|jungazadh]] || [[word:shungazadh|shungazadh]] || [[word:kungazadh|kungazadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungazadh|thungazadh]] || [[word:jungazadh|jungazadh]] || [[word:shungazadh|shungazadh]] || [[word:kungazadh|kungazadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengazadh|thengazadh]] || [[word:jengazadh|jengazadh]] || [[word:shengazadh|shengazadh]] || [[word:kengazadh|kengazadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongazadh|thothongazadh]] || [[word:jojongazadh|jojongazadh]] || [[word:shoshongazadh|shoshongazadh]] || [[word:kokongazadh|kokongazadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongazadh|thongazadh]] || [[word:jongazadh|jongazadh]] || [[word:shongazadh|shongazadh]] || [[word:kongazadh|kongazadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongazadh|thongazadh]] || [[word:jongazadh|jongazadh]] || [[word:shongazadh|shongazadh]] || [[word:kongazadh|kongazadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngazadh|thĂŠngazadh]] || [[word:jĂŠngazadh|jĂŠngazadh]] || [[word:shĂŠngazadh|shĂŠngazadh]] || [[word:kĂŠngazadh|kĂŠngazadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangazadh|thathangazadh]] || [[word:jajangazadh|jajangazadh]] || [[word:shashangazadh|shashangazadh]] || [[word:kakangazadh|kakangazadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazadh|thangazadh]] || [[word:jangazadh|jangazadh]] || [[word:shangazadh|shangazadh]] || [[word:kangazadh|kangazadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazadh|thangazadh]] || [[word:jangazadh|jangazadh]] || [[word:shangazadh|shangazadh]] || [[word:kangazadh|kangazadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangazadh|shangazadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangazadh|goshangazadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangazadh|gokishangazadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangazadhnĂŒ|shangazadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangazadhnknĂŒ|goshangazadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazadhnĂŒ|gokishangazadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangazadhshĂ«|shangazadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkshĂ«|goshangazadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangazadhshĂ«|gokishangazadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazadhro|shangazadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkro|goshangazadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazadhro|gokishangazadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazadhmu|shangazadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkmu|goshangazadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazadhmu|gokishangazadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangazadhsher|shangazadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangazadhnksher|goshangazadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangazadhsher|gokishangazadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangazadhng|shangazadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkng|goshangazadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangazadhng|gokishangazadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangazadhya|shangazadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkya|goshangazadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangazadhya|gokishangazadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangazadhyam|shangazadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkyam|goshangazadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangazadhyam|gokishangazadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazadhnĂŒshĂ«|shangazadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangazadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangazadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazadhnĂŒro|shangazadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazadhnknĂŒro|goshangazadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazadhnĂŒro|gokishangazadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazadhnĂŒmu|shangazadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazadhnknĂŒmu|goshangazadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazadhnĂŒmu|gokishangazadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shangazadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangazadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangazadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazadhshĂ«ro|shangazadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkshĂ«ro|goshangazadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazadhshĂ«ro|gokishangazadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazadhshĂ«mu|shangazadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkshĂ«mu|goshangazadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazadhshĂ«mu|gokishangazadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazadhronĂŒ|shangazadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkronĂŒ|goshangazadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazadhronĂŒ|gokishangazadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazadhroshĂ«|shangazadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkroshĂ«|goshangazadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazadhroshĂ«|gokishangazadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazadhromu|shangazadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkromu|goshangazadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazadhromu|gokishangazadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazadhmunĂŒ|shangazadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkmunĂŒ|goshangazadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazadhmunĂŒ|gokishangazadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazadhmushĂ«|shangazadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkmushĂ«|goshangazadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazadhmushĂ«|gokishangazadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazadhmuro|shangazadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazadhnkmuro|goshangazadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazadhmuro|gokishangazadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
